title: Mam'zelle Nitouche
writer: Marc Allégret, Jacques Bousquet, Henri Meilhac
plot: Célestin, the organist in a convent, has written and composed a light operetta under the name Floridor. One day, the Mother Superior asks him to chaperone one of the boarders, Denise de Flavigny, who is returning home to get marri...
